message:
feat(core): add Deserialize to environment config types for roundtrip serialization

Added serde::Deserialize derive to four types in environment.rs that
previously only had Serialize:
- ConnectionType: SSH/Mosh/Docker/K8s/Local connection enum.
- ConfigSource: Default/File/Environment source provenance enum.
- ConfigRecommendation: Auto-config recommendation struct.
- AutoConfig: Aggregated auto-configuration output struct.

This enables these types to be deserialized from stored configuration
snapshots and wire protocol payloads, which is needed by the distributed
streaming pipeline and the upcoming config-diff diagnostic tooling.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
